title: National Water Rationing Proposal
description: A severe drought threatens national reservoirs, prompting calls for water rationing.

B.title: Increase water prices to reduce consumption

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Raising prices reduces consumption efficiently. Cities facing drought have used pricing to avoid disaster.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Pricing punishes the poor. Voluntary conservation respects freedom.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Voluntary measures rarely work in crises. People underestimate scarcity.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Then educate them — don’t coerce them.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Education is slow. Empty reservoirs aren’t.
